content:
## Architecture

### Crate Placement

| Component | Crate | Rationale |
|-----------|-------|-----------|
| `ChunkingStrategy` trait | `corvia-kernel` | Universal contract, like `Retriever`/`Augmenter` |
| `ChunkingPipeline` | `corvia-kernel` | Kernel orchestrator between adapter and embedding |
| `FormatRegistry` | `corvia-kernel` | Auto-detect + adapter overrides |
| `ChunkingConfig` | `corvia-common` | TOML-configurable parameters |
| `AstChunker` | `corvia-adapter-git` | Keeps tree-sitter deps in adapter crate |
| `MarkdownChunker` | `corvia-kernel` | No special deps, broadly useful |
| `ConfigChunker` | `corvia-kernel` | Uses existing serde deps |
| `PdfChunker` | `corvia-kernel` | PDF text extraction (feature-gated if heavy) |
| `FallbackChunker` | `corvia-kernel` | Recursive text splitting, zero deps |


### New Files

```
crates/corvia-kernel/src/
  chunking_pipeline.rs     — ChunkingPipeline, FormatRegistry, ProcessingReport
  chunking_strategy.rs     — ChunkingStrategy trait, RawChunk, ProcessedChunk, SourceFile types
  chunking_markdown.rs     — MarkdownChunker
  chunking_config_fmt.rs   — ConfigChunker (TOML/YAML/JSON)
  chunking_pdf.rs          — PdfChunker
  chunking_fallback.rs     — FallbackChunker

crates/corvia-common/src/
  config.rs                — add ChunkingConfig section

corvia-adapter-git/src/
  ast_chunker.rs           — AstChunker (migrated from treesitter.rs, implements ChunkingStrategy)
  treesitter.rs            — retained as internal parsing module used by AstChunker
```
